name: Smarty Pants Black Cards List
blackCards: Alright, class. Projects are due this Friday, and don’t forget: you get extra credit for _______!
Archaeologists now believe that Ancient Egyptians worshipped _______.
Behold, I have pulled the sword from the stone! I am now the King of _______.
“Hey Mom? Can you sign this permission slip for _______?”
I am very smart. I am currently reading a 500-page book about _______.
whiteCards: Calculating the volume of a sphere.
Getting my butt stuck in a black hole.
No longer going to school because I already know everything.
Pingus Pongus, God of Ping Pong.
Separating a baby corn from its mother.
Setting stuff on fire with your MIND.
“Showgurt:the yogurt that makes you tap dance.”
